---
title: "Areal Data Models and Spatial Econometrics"
subtitle: "Track B — Geospatial"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Areal Data Models and Spatial Econometrics

**Track**: Track B — Geospatial

Statistical models for data aggregated over regions: census tracts, counties, countries. Covers spatial autoregressive models, spatial regression, and the disease mapping models that bridge to epidemiology.

## Table of Contents

1. Spatial Weights and Neighborhood Structures
2. Spatial Autocorrelation Measures
3. Simultaneous Autoregressive (SAR) Models
4. Conditional Autoregressive (CAR) Models
5. Spatially Varying Coefficient Models
6. Multivariate Areal Models
7. Change of Support and Data Fusion
8. Space-Time Areal Models

---

## Chapter 1: Spatial Weights and Neighborhood Structures

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Spatial Autocorrelation Measures

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Simultaneous Autoregressive (SAR) Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Conditional Autoregressive (CAR) Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Spatially Varying Coefficient Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Multivariate Areal Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Change of Support and Data Fusion

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Space-Time Areal Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
